description_long: This object is a rectangular cardboard box with a vibrant blue background covered in white stars, reminiscent of the American flag. The front and top panels feature a large illustration of a monkey wearing an Uncle Sam hat and suit, with the words 'Monkey Business' in bold, stylized letters—'Monkey' in blue and 'Business' in red. Prominent warning labels and a red eagle logo are visible on multiple sides. The back panel displays images of fireworks effects, product specifications, and additional warnings, suggesting the box contains fireworks or similar items. The overall design is eye-catching, with patriotic motifs and playful graphics dominating the exterior. The box appears sturdy and is likely sealed, with no visible openings or transparent windows.
description: A blue, star-spangled rectangular box featuring a cartoon monkey in an Uncle Sam outfit and bold 'Monkey Business' branding, with warning labels and fireworks imagery.
description_view_0: The front view shows the monkey illustration, 'Monkey Business' branding, and a large warning label on a blue star-patterned background.
description_view_1: The back view highlights product specifications, fireworks effect images, and additional warnings, with the logo and branding repeated.
description_view_2: This side view mirrors the front, again showing the monkey illustration and branding, with less visible warning text.
description_view_3: The opposite back view is nearly identical to view 1, with product details, effect images, and warning labels.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular logo featuring a red eagle head on a yellow background, located near the top center of the front and back panels.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A large cartoon monkey in an Uncle Sam outfit on the front and top panels, serving as a mascot and eye-catching promotional graphic.
